globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://s.ytimg.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; img-src 'self' data: https://i.ytimg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com;
